form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes off a 37 day let-up. Last start won by 0.5 len at this track March 2 over 1400m defeating Miracle Guy carrying 56kg at $113.80. Before that 4th of 9 at this track on February 6 over 1400m, 12 len behind Onna Yume Raku carrying 56kg at $8.70. Solid prospects and a good barrier doesn?t hurt.

form.formComment: Third race start. Promising on debut came from midfield; 2nd of 10 at this track on November 20 over 900m, 2.5 len behind Flanking Line with 55kg at $2.10.
